text:
There once was a girl named Anna who was always bored.

One day, Anna decided to go for a walk.

As she walked, she eventually saw a white owl sitting on a tree branch.

She couldnned her hat and followed the owl.

Soon Anna discovered that the owl was a secret agent.

The secret agent revealed himself as a famous photographer.

They spent the day together.

Anna realized that having an exciting life made her happy.

So she bought a camera.

The first thing she photographed was a blue jay.

The jay took wings and flew away.

Anna smiled.

Having a good time makes everything special.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
